Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Pedagogy–Focused Academic Professional Development Program

Event Location

Media and Events Center

Activity Start

2026-01-07 14:00

Activity End

2026-01-07 16:30

This event has ended. Thank you for your attention.

Organized by the Coordination of Artificial Intelligence–Innovative Learning and Teaching (CILT-AI), the “Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Pedagogy–Focused Academic Professional Development Program” will be held on Wednesday, January 7, between 14:00 and 16:30, at the Media and Events Center, with the aim of addressing digital transformation in higher education, the use of artificial intelligence in academic processes, and pedagogical approaches through current practices. The program is designed for all faculty members, lecturers, and research assistants affiliated with our university.
